summary: Cross-chain bridges scaled from near-zero in early 2020 to a peak of well over $50B in locked value during the 2021-Q1 2022 bull market, dominated by Multichain (peak ~$10.5B Jan 2022), Wormhole/Portal (~$4.6B Apr 2022) and Synapse (~$1.2B Jan 2022). The 2022 bear market plus a wave of catastrophic exploits (Ronin $624M, Wormhole $326M, Nomad $190M, Harmony $100M, BNB Bridge ~$570M minted/~$100M net) collapsed lock-up bridge TVL; Multichain shut down entirely in mid-2023. The modern bridge landscape pivoted toward (a) intent/liquidity-network bridges with low TVL but high throughput (Across, Stargate, Synapse), (b) generalized messaging (LayerZero, Wormhole, Chainlink CCIP), and (c) custodial / wrapped-asset and exchange bridges (WBTC, Coinbase Bridge, exchange BTC bridges, Hyperliquid Bridge, USDT0) which now dominate DefiLlama's 'Bridge' category TVL. As of 2026-06-16 DefiLlama's Bridge category holds ~$46.7B across 166 protocols, but this figure mixes custodial wrapped-asset bridges with true cross-chain transfer bridges, so it is not directly comparable to the 2021-2022 'lock-and-mint' TVL peaks. Cross-chain bridges were the single largest crypto theft vector in 2022 (~$2B / ~69% of all funds stolen per Chainalysis); cumulatively bridges have lost well over $2.8B to exploits. NOTE: category-level historical TVL/volume on DefiLlama is behind a paid API; protocol-level series below are from the free DefiLlama protocol API and are the most rigorous historical points available here.

series.label: DefiLlama Bridge category total TVL (current snapshot)

points.note: Sum of all 166 protocols in DefiLlama 'Bridge' category, as-of 2026-06-16 via api.llama.fi/protocols. Includes custodial/wrapped-asset & exchange bridges (WBTC, Coinbase Bridge, exchange BTC bridges, Hyperliquid Bridge, USDT0), so NOT comparable to 2021-22 lock-and-mint TVL. Confidence: high for the number, medium that it represents 'bridge TVL' in the classic sense.

series.label: Wormhole / Portal token bridge TVL (year-end & peak)

points.note: Year-end 2022-12-31; in-year peak 4.62B (Apr 2022, pre-bear). Hacked Feb 2022 for $326M but TVL backstopped by Jump Crypto.
Year-end 2022-12-31; all-time-high 10.46B on 2022-01-21 (largest single bridge by TVL at the time)
Year-end 2023-12-31; in-year peak 1.89B. Protocol collapsed mid-2023 (CEO arrest in China, ~$1.5B+ user funds frozen/lost). Effectively defunct.
Launched Mar 2022. Year-end 2022-12-31; all-time-high 4.17B on 2022-04-06 (launch liquidity-mining spike)
Year-end 2025-12-31; in-year peak 1.60B. Subject of competing acquisition bids in Aug 2025 (LayerZero $110M, Wormhole higher).
Year-end 2022-12-31 (in-year peak 0.082B). Across is an intent/relayer bridge -> structurally low TVL relative to volume.
Year-end 2024-12-31; all-time-high 0.249B on 2024-12-09. ~ $11.6B bridge volume in 2024.

series.label: Cumulative value stolen from cross-chain bridge hacks (running total)

points.note: Poly Network $611M (Aug 2021) — at the time the largest DeFi hack ever; nearly all funds were later returned by the attacker.

Chainalysis: ~$2B stolen across 13 separate bridge hacks in 2022, = ~69% of all crypto funds stolen that year. Major events: Ronin $624M, Wormhole $326M, Nomad $190M, Harmony Horizon $100M, BNB Bridge ~$570M minted (~$100M net after freeze). North Korea (Lazarus) tied to roughly half.
Immunefi: bridges + cross-chain messaging accounted for ~$1.19B of 2024 losses (per-year, not cumulative).
May 2026 alone: ~$28.6M of ~$70M total monthly crypto exploit losses (42%) were bridge-related, per Yellow research.

key_facts.claim: Largest single bridge by TVL at the 2021-22 peak

key_facts.value: Ronin Bridge $624-625M (173,600 ETH + 25.5M USDC), attributed to Lazarus Group / North Korea
~$190M drained in a permissionless free-for-all exploit

key_facts.claim: BNB Chain (BSC Token Hub) bridge hack
key_facts.value: ~$570M (2M BNB) minted; ~$430M frozen by validator halt -> ~$100-110M net loss
~$611-612M (largest DeFi hack at the time); attacker returned ~all funds within ~15 days
~$2B stolen across 13 bridge hacks = ~69% of all crypto funds stolen in 2022
LayerZero offered $110M; Wormhole Foundation countered higher
~$11.6B transferred in 2024; ~2-min average transfer time (vs 5-7 min for peers)

key_facts.claim: Top DefiLlama 'Bridge' category protocols by TVL
key_facts.value: LayerZero V2 $7.6B, WBTC $7.5B, Hyperliquid Bridge $5.9B, Coinbase Bridge $5.6B, Binance Bitcoin $4.5B, USDT0 $3.7B, Portal/Wormhole $2.1B, JustCryptos $2.0B, Chainlink CCIP $1.3B

top_entities.name: Stargate Finance
top_entities.value: TVL $0.083B (2026-06-16); $4B/mo volume Jul 2025; ATH TVL $4.17B Apr 2022
